title: Implement #1014 structured SkillSpec gates and slots

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Implement GitHub #1014 by encoding transition gates and module slots as structured SkillSpec-compatible data.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not implement generated adapters, plugin definitions, or a runtime workflow engine in this slice.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Extend the SkillSpec schema/manifest with five transition gates and five module slots, regenerate reference docs, and add contract tests.
completion_criteria: SkillSpec manifest contains structured transition-gate entries for startup-to-work, work-to-planning, work-to-proof, work-to-memory-residue, and proof-to-closeout.
SkillSpec manifest contains structured module-slot entries for workspace, planning, planning.closeout, workspace.proof, and memory.
Tests fail when gate or slot entries omit required CLI, fallback, allowed/forbidden actions, interpreted fields, proof/closeout obligations, or preservation requirements.
